member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.BinaryFilterModel
member.summary: A model that represents a binary filter

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.BinaryFilterModel.Left
member.summary: The left side of the binary filter

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.BinaryFilterModel.Right
member.summary: The right side of the binary filter

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.BinaryFilterModel.BinaryData
member.summary: Extension data for the dynamic properties of the filter.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.FilterBuilderOptions
member.summary: Options that control how a is converted to a .

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterBuilderOptions.PreferBinaryData
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether binary filter models should prefer the compact key-value data representation over explicit left/right operands. The default is true.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for converting instances to web model representations.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions.ToFilterModel(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterBuilderOptions)
member.summary: Converts the specified to a suitable for web serialization and exchange.
member.param: Optional options controlling how binary filters are represented in the model. If null, default options are used.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel
member.summary: A model that describes a filter that is used to restrict a set of data.
member.remarks: This object defines a model that can be exchanged between services and clients and be serialized and deserialized safely.

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.Equal
member.summary: Gets or sets the equality binary filter model (JSON: "eq").

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.NotEqual
member.summary: Gets or sets the inequality binary filter model (JSON: "neq").

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.GreaterThan
member.summary: Gets or sets the greater-than binary filter model (JSON: "gt").

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.GreaterThanOrEqual
member.summary: Gets or sets the greater-than-or-equal binary filter model (JSON: "gte").

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.LessThan
member.summary: Gets or sets the less-than binary filter model (JSON: "lt").

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.LessThanOrEqual
member.summary: Gets or sets the less-than-or-equal binary filter model (JSON: "lte").

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.And
member.summary: Gets or sets the logical AND binary filter model (JSON: "and").

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.Or
member.summary: Gets or sets the logical OR binary filter model (JSON: "or").

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.BinaryData
member.summary: Gets or sets the extension data containing simple key-value pairs that represent an equality filter in a compact form.

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.Not
member.summary: Gets or sets the negation (NOT) filter model (JSON: "not").

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets a constant value for this filter (JSON: "value").

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.Ref
member.summary: Gets or sets the variable reference name for this filter (JSON: "ref").

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.Function
member.summary: Gets or sets the function filter model for this filter (JSON: "func").

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.BuildFilter
member.summary: Builds a from this model.
member.exception: Thrown when the model is invalid or incomplete.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterModel.ValidateModel(System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.ValidationContext)
member.summary: Provides a hook for subclasses to add additional validation logic.
member.returns: A collection of validation results, empty if valid.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.FunctionFilterModel
member.summary: Describes a function that is returning a boolean value and is used to filter a set of data.

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FunctionFilterModel.Instance
member.summary: The reference to the variable that is the instance object defining the function.

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FunctionFilterModel.Name
member.summary: The name of the function to invoke.

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FunctionFilterModel.Arguments
member.summary: An optional array of arguments to pass to the function.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.SimpleValueAttribute
member.summary: A validation attribute that ensures the annotated value is a simple (scalar) type, such as a string, number, boolean, date, or a dictionary of simple values. Complex objects and arrays are not considered valid.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.VariableNameAttribute
member.summary: An attribute that can be used to validate a string is a valid variable name for a filter.
